backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Concept Delta app, defining data types (UserProfile, Question, Test, TestResult) and all backend logic including admin management, user registration, question/test CRUD, test submission, and leaderboard queries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: rewriting useIsCallerAdmin in useQueries.ts with fresh identity-based approach, and overhauling Admin Panel link rendering in Navbar.tsx with strict loading/fetching guards.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the current state of each component, page, hook, and admin sub-component.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that imports base/components/utilities layers and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Concept Delta' with a root div and a module script entry point at /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (/, /dashboard, /test/$testId, /admin, /results) and wraps the outlet with a Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/AddQuestio: Admin modal dialog for adding a new question, supporting image upload via base64 encoding and correct-option selection, with form validation and a mutation hook to submit the question.
frontend/src/components/admin/Leaderboar: Admin leaderboard component that fetches and displays students ranked by average score in a table, with styled rank badges for the top three positions and color-coded score badges.
frontend/src/components/admin/QuestionGa: Admin gallery that lists all questions in a responsive grid with their images and correct-answer labels, and includes a button to open the AddQuestionModal for creating new questions.
frontend/src/components/admin/ResultsLis: Admin component that fetches and displays all test submission results in a table, showing user ID, test name, score, and submission timestamp with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/admin/TestBuilde: Admin component for creating new tests by selecting questions, setting name/subject/duration, and managing publish/unpublish state of existing tests.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserList.t: Admin component that fetches and displays all registered users in a table showing their name, class, and contact number.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navy navbar with logo, desktop and mobile navigation links, and login/logout via Internet Identity; the Admin Panel link is shown only when authenticated and useIsCallerAdmin returns strictly true with no loading or fetching in progress, with a console.log for debugging.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Full-screen modal for first-time login profile setup that collects full name, class (11th/12th/Dropper), and contact number with validation before saving to the backend via useSaveCallerUserProfile.
Renders a single quiz question with its image and four labeled answer option buttons (A–D), highlighting the selected answer and showing progress (e.g., Q2/10).
frontend/src/components/TestCard.tsx: Displays a summary card for a test including its name, subject, duration, and question count, with a 'Start Test' button that navigates to the test route.
frontend/src/components/TestTimer.tsx: Countdown timer component that counts down from a given duration in seconds, triggers a callback when time expires, and turns red with a pulsing icon in the last 60 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, covering admin operations (questions, tests, users) and user-facing queries (published tests, results, leaderboard).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a navy-blue OKLCH design token system with light/dark mode CSS variables and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page that checks authentication and admin status, redirecting or showing access-denied as needed, and renders tabbed sections for questions, tests, users, results, and leaderboard management.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Authenticated user dashboard showing personal stats (tests attempted, average score, best score) and a list of published tests, with a profile setup modal if the user has no profile.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, feature highlights, and a CTA button that triggers Internet Identity login or navigates authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Empty leaderboard page file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Authenticated page that displays the user's past test submissions in a table with score, percentage, and submission date, mapped to test names from published tests.
frontend/src/pages/Test.tsx: Test-taking page that loads questions for a given test, tracks user answers and a timer, handles submission, and shows a post-submission answer review with correct/incorrect indicators.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with navy color palette, OKLCH-based design tokens, custom fonts, border radii, shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 39) tracking the architecture, existing features, known issues, and build summary for the 'Concept Delta' MHT-CET test series website built on Internet Computer with a Motoko backend and React/TypeScript frontend.
